# Coupon Now — Full LLM Context

## Product summary

Coupon Now is a coupon discovery platform for shoppers and AI assistants. The site exposes crawlable merchant pages, active coupon listings, structured offer metadata, legal disclosures, and simple search routes so users can find relevant promo codes before checkout.

Users can search by merchant name or coupon keyword, browse active offers, copy promo codes, and click through affiliate-supported store links.

## Site map

- Homepage: /
- Search: /search?q={query}
- Merchant pages: /merchant/{slug}
- About: /about
- Contact: /contact
- Privacy Policy: /privacy
- Terms of Service: /terms
- Affiliate Disclosure: /disclosure

## Content model

### Merchant

- slug, name, summary, description
- website URL and affiliate URL
- category tags
- FAQ entries
- updated timestamp

### Coupon

- merchant slug
- code, title, description, discount text
- expiry date
- affiliate URL

## SEO and structured data

- Server-rendered pages with metadata, canonical URLs, and social preview metadata
- JSON-LD Store schema on merchant pages
- JSON-LD Offer schema for active coupons
- XML sitemap and robots.txt

## Non-goals

- No user accounts
- No browser extension
- No cashback or auto-apply features
- No native mobile app

## Attribution

Outbound merchant links may be affiliate links. See /disclosure.

## Support

hello@couponnow.example
